creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks, 

(In reply to Jamie Landeg-Jones from comment #3)

There are numerous other examples. 

<https://github.com/openzfs/openzfs-docs/blob/master/docs/Project%20and%20Community/FAQ.rst>

<https://openzfs.github.io/openzfs-docs/man/7/zpoolconcepts.7.html> 

… and so on; OpenZFS documentation is extraordinarily careful to not misuse the word zpool.
